validation.name: Please enter your name
validation.phone: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.summary: Briefly describe what you need help with

step1.title: Contact information
step1.description: Fill in your details so we can better assist you.

step2.title: What would you like to discuss?
step2.description: Briefly describe the matter so our team already has context when assisting you.

email.label: Email
email.help: Please confirm your email after submitting - it is how we will contact you.

summary.label: Summary
summary.placeholder: Example: I need guidance regarding a purchase and sale contract...

virtualAssistant.title: Virtual assistant
virtualAssistant.introLine1: Hello. I can help with information about our team, practice areas and how the firm works.
virtualAssistant.introLine2: If you prefer, you can also speak directly with our team on WhatsApp.
virtualAssistant.errorResponse: I couldn't respond right now. Please try again.
virtualAssistant.streamInterrupted: The answer was interrupted. Please send again.
virtualAssistant.streamIncomplete: The response may be incomplete. Please ask again.
virtualAssistant.ctaWhatsApp: Talk to the team on WhatsApp

resendConfirmation.success: A new confirmation email was sent successfully.

errors.alreadyConfirmed: This email has already been confirmed.
errors.rateLimited: You reached the resend limit. Please try again later.
errors.resendFailed: Could not resend now. Please try again.
errors.network: Connection error while trying to resend.
errors.unknown: Could not resend now. Please try again.

success.title: Email confirmed successfully
success.description: Your email was validated. Our team can now proceed with regular contact.

already_confirmed.title: This email has already been confirmed
already_confirmed.description: Your record was already validated. If needed, you can contact our team now.

expired.title: Expired link
expired.description: The confirmation link expired. You can request a new one right now.

invalid.title: Invalid link
invalid.description: We could not validate this link. Request a new confirmation email.
